headline: Becton, Dickinson Recieves FDA Clearance for Surgiphor 1000 ml Irrigation System
summary: Becton, Dickinson and Company (NYSE:BDX) is included among the 13 Undervalued Dividend Aristocrats to Buy Now. Becton, Dickinson and Company (NYSE:BDX) is one of the world’s largest pure-play medical technology companies in the world. BD drives innovation across medical essentials, connected care, biopharma systems, and interventional. Becton, Dickinson and Company (NYSE:BDX) announced on March 2 […]
